modName: The Tatars - A Central Asian Civ
description:
Adds the Tatars, an Asian civilisation representing the Turkic successors to the great Steppe empires of the Middle Ages.

The Tatars in detail:

  • Houses are replaced by Yurts, which support less population, but can train and fatten livestock and spawn a sheep when built.
  • Villagers are replaced by Kotuces, who are faster, see further, and can be trained with food or export.
  • The Rice Paddy is replaced by Mills and Bazars, agricultural buildings which can produce either coin or export.
  • A Yurt Rickshaw is delivered with each shipment.
  • A consulate featuring 2 new allies, the Chinese and the Polish.
  • Wonders that generate export, train consulate units, improve livestock, provide healing or spawn powerful units.
  • Fully realised selection of powerful, interesting, or downright gimmicky home city cards.

Units of the Tatars:

  • Mirza: Cavalry archer hero with a special rapid-fire attack
  • Tabardar: Cheap hand infantry
  • Qaravul: Tough foot archer
  • Qazaq: Quick heavy cavalry
  • Mergen: High damage, low hitpoint mounted archer
  • Seymen: Elite, short range rifle infantry
  • Batir: Heavy lance/bow cavalry with good melee armour
  • Marauder: Torch-armed heavy siege cavalry
  • Wall Gun: Slow anti-artillery cannon

Other features:

  • 4 brand new mercenaries that can appear on any map - the Abrek, Circassian Lancer, Dzungar Marksman and Shutarnal.
  • All new units fully voiced in 6 different languages!
  • Building textures inspired by the stunning architecture of Central Asia.

Massive thanks to the Age of Pirates and Age of the World teams for the use of some of their icons. Special thanks to Stark22e for inspiring this mod and creating the units used in the Polish consulate ally!

!!!Make sure to restart the game after subscribing if the Tatars aren't showing up in the civ selection menu!!!

modName: First Sino-Japanese War甲午中日战争
description:
今天是2025年8月15日，​是抗日战争胜利80周年，我特制作此mod来纪念先烈，勿忘家仇国恨，大好河山，寸土不让！
该mod数据几乎无修改，主要为外观变化，不可天梯，需要对方打此mod才能联机
一.大清变化
1 大清常规兵种，诸葛弩，长枪，怯薛均改为近代清朝外观，不再随着升级变化外观草原骑兵 一阶段改为更美观的模型，二阶段不变，三阶段改为布面甲
2 长刀，双骑，铁军，满洲骑射手，改为八旗样式，藤牌手改为清朝虎衣藤牌手样式（铁军，满洲骑射手，藤牌手仅大清阵营修改，其他国家佣兵还是原来外观）
3 火绳枪兵改为参加甲午战争的淮军样式，猛火油柜也是淮军样式，喷火车改成铁质的
4 领事馆红杉军改成北洋水师海军陆战队，北洋水师1882年成立"洋枪队"作为中国首支海军陆战队，穿红衣白裤，负责舰上执法与登陆作战，1895年威海卫之战300人全部殉国，英勇可加
5 神火飞鸭改成红衣大炮，轻型迫击炮改成威远将军炮
6 福船，战斗帆船，火帆船，迫击炮战船 升级“装甲”科技后，均变成甲午海战铁甲舰的样式，其中福船变为定远/镇远铁甲舰，迫击炮战船变为经远/来远,战斗帆船和火帆船都变为致远/靖远/济远/平远（火帆船和战斗帆船模型相同，可以“撞沉吉野”了）
7 打卡龙年送的巨蜥改为龙
8 大清村庄变为四合院
二.日本变化
1.火枪升级后变为明治新军样式
2.剃刀骑兵升级后变为近代样式
3.铁甲船，安宅船，日本船，迫击炮战船 升级“装甲”科技后，均变成甲午海战铁甲舰的样式，为吉野，松岛、严岛、桥立、浪速、高千穗、秋津洲、千代田等近代铁甲舰
感谢：吓死蛮牛，阿拉伯的劳伦斯，帝国葡散，El Ermitaño

Mod Title: "80th Anniversary of the Victory in the War of Resistance Against Japan" (August 15, 2025)​​
"Honoring the Heroes, Remembering the National Humiliation — Not an Inch of Our Land Shall Be Lost!"

​Note: This is a cosmetic mod with minimal gameplay adjustments. Ladder matches are disabled. Multiplayer requires both players to install the mod for visual synchronization.

 
​I. Qing Dynasty (China) Faction Changes​
​Standard Units:

​Chu Ko Nu (Repeating Crossbowmen)​, ​Spearmen, and ​Keshik​ now wear late-Qing Dynasty uniforms. Appearance no longer changes with upgrades.
​Steppe Cavalry:Tier 1: Enhanced visual model.
Tier 2: Unchanged.
Tier 3: Upgraded to bumianjia (布面甲, brigandine armor).
​Unique Units (Qing-exclusive)​:

​Changdao Swordsmen, ​Double-Handed Lancers, ​Iron Troops, and ​Manchu Archers​ redesigned in Eight Banners military attire.
​Rattan Shieldmen​ now wear Tiger-Striped Rattan Armor (虎衣藤牌手).
(Mercenary versions for other factions remain unchanged.)
​Firearm Units:

​Arquebusiers​ reskinned as Huai Army troops (淮军) from the First Sino-Japanese War (1894–95).
​Flamethrowers​ (Meng Huo You Gui) and ​Steam Tanks​ reflect Huai Army aesthetics (tanks now iron-plated).
​Consulate Units:

​Redcoat Marines​ replaced by Beiyang Fleet Naval Infantry (北洋水师海军陆战队):China’s first marine unit (est. 1882), dressed in red coats/white trousers.
Historical tribute: 300 martyrs died defending Weihaiwei in 1895.
​Artillery:

​​"Flying Crow" rockets​ → Hongyi Cannons (红衣大炮).
​Light Mortars​ → Weiyuan General Cannons (威远将军炮).
​Navy Overhaul​ (Post-"Ironclad" tech):

​Junk​ → Dingyuan/Zhenyuan-class battleships (定远/镇远).
​Mortar Junks​ → Jingyuan/Laiyuan-class (经远/来远).
​War Junks​ & ​Fire Ships​ → Zhiyuan/Jingyuan/Jiyuan/Pingyuan-class (致远/靖远/济远/平远).
(Fire Ships share models with War Junks — "Sink the Yoshino!" enabled.)
​Year of the Dragon Reward:

​Komodo Dragon​ → Chinese Dragon.
​Villages:

Qing settlements now feature siheyuan (四合院) courtyard designs.
 
​II. Japan Faction Changes​
​​Musketeers:

​Musketeers​ upgrade to Meiji Imperial Army uniforms.
​Cavalry:

​Naginata Riders​ adopt late-19th-century designs.
​Navy Overhaul​ (Post-"Ironclad" tech):

​Atakebune, ​Turtle Ships, ​Mortar Ships​ → First Sino-Japanese War ironclads:Yoshino, Matsushima, Itsukushima, Hashidate, Naniwa, Takachiho, Akitsushima, Chiyoda.
 
​Special Thanks:
Scary Wild Bull, Lawrence of Arabia, Empire Pusan, El Ermitaño

​Historical Context:
This mod commemorates the 80th anniversary of Japan’s surrender (August 15, 1945), aligning unit designs with the First Sino-Japanese War (1894–95) — a pivotal conflict that shaped modern East Asia.

(All changes are visual-only. For multiplayer, ensure both players install the mod.)

万历朝鲜战争战役

简介：本mod将原版天明mod同名战役移植到决定版中，在尊重原作创作基础上修改少量文本，重制大量触发和ai以适配决定版环境，以及重制部分过场动画。在原版八关战役的基础上添加第九关本人自创关卡：露梁海战，以及两个原创过场动画，在尽可能尊重历史的情况下保证可玩性&贴近官方战役的质感与体验。

※必备条件：游玩战役必须同时订阅模块总复习的明清蒙mod，以及日本战国全明星mod，不然必会出现bug。
 
※安装方法：同时订阅三个模组之后，需手动调整以下内容（mod文件不会直接覆盖本地文件必须要手动）：
1.剧情文件：把mods\subscribed\万历朝鲜战争\scenario文件夹下面的Age3 Custom Campaign整个文件夹放到:\Users\\Games\Age of Empires 3 DE\一串数字\Scenario文件夹里
2.ai文件：把mods\subscribed\万历朝鲜战争\game\AI下面的aiCustomer07.xs放到Steam\steamapps\common\AoE3DE\Game\AI文件夹里，然后把同个文件夹下的tokugawa.personality放到Age of Empires 3 DE\一串数字\Game\AI文件夹下面，选择覆盖原文件（覆盖前一定备份原文件！！！！mod关掉时需要手动换回原文件！！！！没备份文件遗失概不负责！！！）
3.卡组&主城文件：把mods\subscribed\万历朝鲜战争\game\campaign下面的homecityspc_cc文件放到Steam\steamapps\common\AoE3DE\Game\Campaign下面，可获得战役预制卡组，陆战海战各一套，30张卡，想自定义的会改的可以自己改这个文件。（不想船运打卡追求更高难度也可以省略这一步不影响游玩）

※游玩方法：本系列战役因为修改了ai所以无法从小规模战斗启动游玩，即使启动了ai也不会动！！第一次游玩建议从主界面——加载——Age of Empires 3 Custom Campaign——  Age C1 Cinematic开始游玩(C1代表第一关，cinematic是动画，gameplay是关卡，大部分动画播在关卡前, b cinematic是关卡结束后的动画);大部分关卡均设置不同难度（简单，中等，困难），从加载进默认简单难度，只能从剧情编辑器里测试剧情才能调整难度，但是这样地图也就都能看见了会剧透破坏体验，所以建议第一次游玩直接从加载进，简单难度初见亦有挑战性，在通关一次剧情后再选择从编辑器里挑战更高难度。每一关卡中间有过场动画，长按空格可以跳过，不过为了更好的体验还是建议都看完（尤其是通关后的最后一幕动画，从构思到布景到转场与音乐搭配等等都耗费了我大量心血）。

添加了拥有独特单位的朝鲜，但是###i和主城&卡片，所以不能在小规模战斗里用，只是一个战役spc文明。旗帜来自朝鲜文明mod，兵种模型来自阿拉伯的劳伦斯和模块总复习，以及原版自由之战模组。替换了部分游戏头像给战役人物用，图片来自三国志11血色衣冠同名人物（李如松，麻贵，陈璘，李舜臣等等）。战役原体来自天明制作组。感谢以上所有组织和个人。
Restores the beta (Legacy) voice of the Fusilier, who spoke in Swedish before changing their voice to that of the French Grenadier.

對作者pwao的朝鮮文明模組進行繁中翻譯（现在也有简中翻译了，至于图片我就懒得改了）

作者pwao的朝鮮文明：https://www.ageofempires.com/mods/details/58954/

這是我第一次做模組（雖然只是單純進行內文翻譯，而且英文也沒有很專業到哪裡去，純粹用愛發電），希望讓對該模組有興趣但英文不太好的同好能夠更了解該模組的相關信息。

我單純只改string文件而已，裡面還有些英文，不過我在string文件裡找不到，就沒管了。有些官方隨便亂來的翻譯，比如日本長弓兵、中國長槍兵、輕型迫擊炮之類的翻譯，考慮到有些人或是新手還不太熟悉那些單位較正確的名稱，或是對官方翻譯已經習慣，改不過來的，我就按照回官方的翻譯算了。而且有些翻譯應該會讓對朝鮮歷史很專業的人會覺得很奇怪。會感覺不對很正常，因為我是靠google和gpt去翻譯和找資料，只要找到了，大致對得上就直接丟進去了。然後有些翻譯我稍微加了自己一點私心下去，舉幾個例子：

架火戰車：我找資料時，維基百科上寫韓國人都叫“火車”，但考慮到裡面遊戲裡已經有火車了（時代四的貿易路線那個），想換個名稱，旁邊又寫“類似中國的架火戰車”，所以乾脆用架火戰車這個名稱。

鐵甲騎兵：google找沒有，只能問gpt，然後讓gpt想個符合特征又聽起來感覺很帥的名稱，然後自己從中選或是再進行發想。

如果有能補充資料的，歡迎補充

Change the unit voice of the Spanish Explorer Delgado to the voice of the Rodelero/Conquistador.

The reason for this mod is because Delgado's voice is very similar to Simón Bolívar's (they were probably dubbed by the same actor).

Likewise, his cinematic voice is not the same as his unit's (at least in the Spanish version), so I don't think there will be any problems with changing his unit dialogue.

Update: Now compatible with IronKaiser's Better English Voices mod

SANTIAGO!

Replaces the voices of Settlers, Rodeleros & Conqueror, and the Spanish missionary with those from Age of Empires 2.

In AOE2, Spanish units speak Early Modern Spanish (a Northern Iberian variant), which makes them sound medieval but more appealing to the Spanish civilization.

P.S. The missionary unit's voices use the voices of the Spanish King from AOE2, not his AOE2 counterpart.

又是另一個丹麥文明，和之前作者PWAO的是不一樣玩法，最近在嘗試用作者PWAO的丹麥文明來玩，玩得要爆炸，一直要管資源，還要注意升時代的時候哪個資源會突然不見到完。畢竟只和AI玩，目前還在嘗試哪種打法比較快。

先在此說明下，我做的這些翻譯檔主要是為了讓我這個英文白癡可以直接在遊戲內看得懂，不然頭腦轉不過來，分配資源還沒理清，突然看到英文，還要再頭腦裡面翻譯，都不知道飛了幾秒了，FPS遊戲都是很看重每分每秒的。同時我丟上官網，也是為了讓更多人可以嘗試玩玩看別人製作的，更多不同的文明。

注：探險家那個隨機的名字我就沒翻譯了，畢竟名字翻譯都是很難有真正準確的翻譯唸法。

有什麼資料可以補充的，歡迎補充。

-Receive 1 shipment. Citizens can be trained from Town Centers.

NEW CARDS
-Garde Civique: You receive a free Revolutionary for all your past and future shipments. Increases the hitpoints and attack of Revolutionaries by 15% and allows you to train them at the Barracks.

-Belgian Industrialization: All artillery, buildings and ships are constructed 10% faster. Artillery Foundry, Factory and Dock upgrades cost -35%.
-Belgian Railways: Trade Route upgrades are free and generate 50% more resources.
-Defensive Doctrine: Enables Envoys to build Forts, Outposts and Walls. Forts cost 30% less to construct and two more may be constructed.

OTHER CARDS: 2 Covered Wagons, Advanced Arsenal, Factory, Robber Barons, Castramentation, INF 2 Horse Artillery, INF 16 Revolutionaries, Textile Mill, Infantry Damage, Infantry Hitpoints Team, Infantry Combat, Cavalry Combat, Bank of Amsterdam (renamed as "Bank of Brussels"), Bank of Rotterdam (renamed as "Bank of Antwerp"), Extensive Fortifications, Heavy Fortifications.

...

This is my pitch for a possible Belgian Revolution. If any developer is interested in my design, please feel free to use it and contact me if you want, I’d love to see some of my content made official. Any questions, suggestions or corrections are welcome.
This mod should work in any language, but only with English, Spanish, or Simplified Chinese text (only if Spanish or Simplified Chinese are selected respectively).
Thanks to user FastSpark431808 for encouraging me to make this mod and helping me with the translation into Simplified Chinese.

The Classic CBA recreated for AOE3. This is based on the AOE2 scenario by the same name. 

Join my discord server to discuss balance, new features, and other maps designed by me.
https://discord.gg/aNrKpuxgKQ

You get free units to battle similar to the colosseum scenario. Your goal is to destroy your opponents Towers before they destroy your own. 

Your population will increase with number of kills and you will age up with xp gained. As you increase your population your units drop more xp to their killers allowing for them to catch up. 

You can play in any team format you'd like. This includes: 1v1, 2v2v2, FFA, 3v3, or 4v4. 

Host with default settings as the map will handle the rest.

Changes in 1.1.0: 

New:
Updated XP Reward System.

Added Bonus for xp after Imperial is reached. Every 10k xp you gain 5% Attack and HP on all units.
Added Population increase to 200 pop (from 150 pop max).
Fixed:
Fixed Gates from gaining +30000 HP on industrial age. Now permanently set to 7500 HP.

Civ Balance:
Ottomans:+8s Spawn Time on Spahi (37s -> 45s)
+8s Spawn Time on Abus (22s -> 30s)
Russians: 
+1s Spawn Time on Strelet (5s->6s)
Indians:
+1s Spawn Time on Sepoy (11s -> 12s)
+5s Spawn Time on Mahout (45s -> 50s)
+4s Spawn Time on Howdah (41s -> 45s)
Hausa:
+3s Spawn Time on Maigadi (22s -> 25s)

Good Luck and Have Fun!

modName: Tatars Civilization_Bill Justice中文翻譯模組
description:
對作者Bill Justice的韃靼文明模組進行中文翻譯


作者Bill Justice的韃靼文明：https://www.ageofempires.com/mods/details/398090/


這次又是一個亞洲文明，八百多條項目，翻譯得眼睛痛。之後還有幾個文明，項目更多，等有空再繼續翻譯。

——————————————

2025/11/06

靠北我試玩了幾天，吐槽幾句。

我個人是手殘黨，幾場下來感覺運營超累。首先每張卡會送屋子，而每間屋子只給 5 人口。

問題來了，前期需要擴充人口，需要發卡或派人建房子，但前期缺資源，不補房子就會卡人口，但沒有資源就沒法建房子，不建房子又會卡人口，死循環。而且建房子又沒有快捷鍵，只能滑鼠一個一個按

後期經濟上來，瘋狂發卡，一堆馬車堆在經濟船運點，超級礙事，又要隨時弄房子，然後前線兵還沒出完，又在卡人口，又要回去開人口。弄完後再看下前線，很好，軍隊都被AI砍死了。。。。。

在此建議，手殘黨或只想輕鬆玩的同好們，慎碰，我個人是一點都不想再動這個文明了，心累。。。。。。

——————————————

Experience a redesigned Home City Picker interface!

Replaces the old civilization list with a stylish grid-style picker, making it easier and faster to browse your Home Cities with a modern visual layout.

Behold, a most distinguished improvement! No longer shall the venerable Longbowmen be cast aside, for their proud tradition endures unbroken. Instead, the cunning Rangers are added as a noble complement—an extra arm of the King’s might, not a usurper of it.

Thus, the Barracks, Forts, and even the grand Galleons shall now muster both—the steadfast Longbow with its whispering string, and the Ranger’s rifle with its thunderous roar. Together they stand, old and new, united in service to crown and country!

 

This mod allows the existence of Longbowmen along with Rangers. Thus, you may make them a part of the same army

Rangers will be added to the Barracks, Forts and galleons instead of replacing the Longbows.

Both receive their upgrades from the same techs, as usual. I simply deactivated the deactivation (and added Rangers in a different place in the grids).

-Enables the training of Citizens, Musketeers and Ski Infantry (Royal Guard Skirmishers who move 10% faster).

NEW CARDS
-Norse Infantry: Musketeers, Caroleans and Ski Infantry can build Barracks, Stables and Artillery Foundries. They can also build Outposts and Forts if the Castramentation card is sent.
-Norwegian Musketeers: Ships 16 Musketeers. The cards "Platoon Fire", "Snaplock" and "Svea Lifeguard" now also benefit Musketeers.
-Norwegian Dragoons: Ships 8 Guard Dragoons and allows you to train them at Stables and Forts.
-Norwegian Artillery Division: Ships 4 Horse Artillery and reduces their population cost by -1.
-Advanced Whaling: Ships 1 Humpback Whale. Fishing Boats gather coin from Whales 25% faster. Caravels and Steamers gather coin from Whales 50% faster.
-Karljohansvern Shipyard: Ships 1 Steamer and allows them to be constructed in the Docks replacing the Galleons. Steamers get +1 build limit, +25% hit points and attack, +2 Line of Sight and range.
-Norwegian Constitution: Advances you to Imperial Age and grants 1 Shipment.

OTHER CARDS: Advanced Dock, Whale Oil, Fish Market, Rendering Plant, TEAM House of Bernadotte, Platoon Fire, Snaplocks, Svea Lifeguard, 14 Skirmishers INFINITE, JaegerCombat, Cavalry Damage, Ranged Cavalry Combat, Finnhorses (renamed as "Fjord Horses"), Gunboats, Improved Warships, Kalmar Castle (renamed as "Akershus Fortress"), Castramentation, Factory, Industrial Revolution, Osemund Process INFINITE, Great Northern Forests.

...

This is my pitch for a possible Norwegian Revolution. If any developer is interested in my design, please feel free to use it and contact me if you want, I’d love to see some of my content made official. Any questions, suggestions or corrections are welcome.
This mod should work in any language, but only with English, Spanish, or Simplified Chinese text (only if Spanish or Simplified Chinese are selected respectively).
Thanks to user FastSpark431808 for encouraging me to make this mod and helping me with the translation into Simplified Chinese.
Have Fun!

More of a fun test of ideas and capabilities, China feels good to me so this is more trying out new things

Unit and building changes

New Banner armies

Mandarin army -> 2 Iron Troops & 1 Manchus ( 620G 7 pop) - Unlocked with Atonement 

This was already in the game with no icons apparently

Mandarin Duck Squad ->3 Chu Ko Nus & 1 Flame Thrower (200 seconds spawn time) - Only available at the Summer Palace, Unlocked with Mandarin Duck Squad Card

Iron Cap Prince's Army -> 2 Changdaos & 2 Flame Throwers (290 seconds spawn time) - Only available at the Summer Palace, Unlocked with Iron Cap Prince's Army Card

Emperor's Army -> 4 Arq & 3 Hand Mortars (250 seconds Spawn time) - Only available at the Summer Palace, Unlocked with Emperor's Army Card

Ever Victorious Army -> 2 Iron Flail & 1 Flying Crow (360 seconds Spawn time) -  Only available at the Summer Palace, Unlocked with Ever Victorious Army Card

All the spawn time are done to roughly match the 3 res per second time of existing banner armies

Shaolin Master - Roundhouse Attack changed to a charge attack, secondary effect changed to increased attack speed rather then 100% crit (secondary effect duration increased to 15 instead of 8), Damage cap increased to 340 instead of 200

Stun ability can also be done on Outlaws

Temple of Heaven Heal is now a Padre Style multiple unit heal (rate still the same)

An idea I have had for a while for melee abilities to make it more easy to be used, secondary effect changed cause the other effect is probably hard coded and I cant replicate it

The Stun ability is a test if there are other ways of making the early age abilities usable lategame and trying to explore new design space for outlaws (being weaker against heros)

Note: This effect will stack with 2 Shaolin Master

Summer Palace - Mongolian Army and Black Flag army added as base banner army spawn (It was already in the game)

Temple of Heaven - Now also acts as a Mountain Monestary Passive heal.

 

 

Cards and tech changes

Repelling Volley - Added back +10% Damage increase

Professional Gunners, Trunion, Heated Shot, Gunners Quadrant now available at the Confucian Academy

Mass Production (factory tech) - Now also affects Flying Crows

Industrial Shadow Tech (just aging to industrial from any age up) - Reduces Flying Crow spawn time by 40%

TEAM Engineering School - Also reduces the spawn time of new Banner armies by 5% (cause they all have arillery or siege units)

Mandarin Duck Squad - Now also unlocks the army at the Summer Palace

Iron Cap Prince's Army - Now also unlocks the army at the Summer Palace

Emperor's Army - Now also unlocks the army at the Summer Palace

Ever Victorious Army - Now also unlocks the army at the Summer Palace

Mongolian Scourge - Iron Flails gains +10% damage and 0.5 AOE

Fire Dragon Manual - Gives Hand Mortar the Grapeshot Treatment of faster movement and single mode action

Accupunture -  Similar Balance mechanism added for the new banner armies (Net -5% Spawn time)

Attonement - No longer unlocks Iron Troops, Unlocks Mandarin Army instead

Manchu Combat - Gives Meteor Hammer +0.5 Range and Changdaos +0.1 melee armor

Imperial Shadow Tech (just aging to imperial from any age up) - Reduces Banner Armies Train time by 10% (including all the Summer palace stuff)

Porcelain Tower Restoration (NEW TECH) - Cost 2000 F 2000G  Available at Imp at the Porcelain Tower built before Imp and sets the gather rate to Imp Gather rate. 

Mandarin Mercenary Army - Now Infinite

Other more Misc Changes

Tech Descriptions for Changes - As a way to test my ability to edit Strings

Musket Infantry tag - Text Changed to Line Infantry (something I wanted to do for a while)

description:
两个版本1相对简单，2困难一点。两个图都是在原来的《乡村防守》基础上做了些修改，前期更简单了。后期电脑做了加强，可玩性也增加了。玩家开局资源各三千，配有可以建造固定炮的英雄。电脑增加了鲜血工厂，后期电脑高速出火枪兵，并且大概率出BOSS（华盛顿巨像和坦克）。

Version 1 is relatively simple, while version 2 is a bit more difficult. Both images have been modified based on the original "Rural Defense" and made simpler in the early stages. The computer has been strengthened in the later stage, and its playability has also increased. Players start with 3000 resources each, equipped with heroes who can build fixed cannons. The computer has added a blood factory, and in the later stage, the computer will produce high-speed firearms and most likely bosses (such as the Washington Colossus and tanks).

description:
At the request of OldPippo1994 

CONTENT CREATED BY AI

Replaces the Spanish flag with a version of the medieval Burgundy Cross flag.

From OldPippo1994:

"It is the late medieval form of the cross of burgundy. As it’s a late medieval representation of the Cross of Saint Andrew, who was killed on an wooden x-shaped cross, it’s from the time emperor Maximilian of Habsburg (Austria) took over the Burgundian lands, the representation of the cross as an actual wooden cross is typical for late medieval/(very) early renaissance art."

P.S. This flag is difficult to find online, and even harder to replicate with AI. Any modification questions or suggestions should be posted in the mod's forum.

Reduces the number of wagons in Empire Wars mode by limiting them to Age 1 and Age 2 shipments.

This prevents you from being flooded with wagons in the end game when you no longer need them. And restores the main feature of Empire Wars: a faster start without changing the end game too much.

NB: The first lines of revolution cards are considered to be Age 1 and 2 shipments. So you can always do an ‘outpost madness’ with the Romanians and Hungarians. Or hold on to your cities' infrastructure before the citizens arrive.

NB 2: Some federal cards give Empire war wagons, but not all of them.

[EN] Returning from exile, Austria, Russia, Prussia and the United Kingdom formed the Seventh Coalition against Napoleon. Napoleon led the Belgian campaign to prevent the British and Prussian armies from joining forces. After defeating the Prussians at Ligny on 16 June, he faced the forces of the Duke of Wellington on 18 June, blocking the road to Brussels. Having received a promise of reinforcements from Prussian General Gebhard Von Blücher, Wellington held his ground throughout the day. 50,000 Prussians arrived from the east at 4 p.m. and turned the tide of battle.

But, as a brilliant general, will you rewrite history?

 

[FR] 

De retour d'exil, l'Autriche, la Russie, la Prusse et le Royaume uni forment la 7e coalition contre Napoléon. Ce dernier mène la campagne de Belgique pour empêcher les armées Britanniques et Prussiennes de se regrouper. Après avoir battu les Prussiens à Ligny le 16 juin, il affronte le 18 les forces du Duc de Wellington qui sont sur la route de Bruxelles. Ayant eu une promesse de renforts de la part du Général prussien Gebhard Von Blücher, Wellington tint bon toute la journée. 50 000 Prussiens arrivèrent par l'Est à 16h et renversèrent le cours de la bataille.

Mais, en tant que brillant général, est-ce que vous allez l'histoire se répéter?
和之前有点区别，所以分开上传。城防增加！人口上限增加20。固定炮占1人口，限制造10个。如果队友掉线或者出局了，不用担心,剩余玩家的人口上限和固定炮建造上限会得到增加。人机3V3,地图不大，但是资源丰富。三条路玩家需要各自防守并互相支援。开局记得建城墙，保护好巨炮，三个巨炮被毁则玩家失败。一如既往的元素有：鲜血工厂、固定炮。战胜AI的关键是多建固定炮、摧毁鲜血工厂，消灭AI。全程热血。

You do NOT need to restart after updating this mod.

Current Maps: Arena Unknown, Mosaic Nexus, Andes Unknown, Anatolian Gedík, Summits Edge, Amba Highlands, Mojave Mesas, European Atlas, Devil's Pit, Pioneer's Pass, Lakota Hill, Crescent Ridge, Quad Peaks, Artic Triad, Rockies Reworked, Dakota Reworked, Mexico Reworked, Orinoco Unknown, Improved Unknown

Artic Triad is a snow-themed Treaty map built around three primary battle lanes created by impassable mountain ridges on the left and right sides of the map. The layout scales from 1v1 through 4v4, expanding terrain and spacing to maintain balance at every size. Players can expect abundant and evenly distributed resources, perimeter forests for late-game wood access, and additional trees near each Town Center. Four native settlements spawn per match, two per team and available during the Treaty period, randomly selected from a winter-appropriate pool including Cree, Nootka, House Oldenburg, House Wettin, Tengri. Artic Triad is designed for competitive Treaty play with a focus on fairness, symmetry.

Orinoco Unknown - Welcome to Orinoco with a twist! Is there Snow, Desert or a Jungle...Natives, Alliances or both!? Cows or Sheep? Native Settlements: All native settlements are possible!

Quad Peaks is a land-only Treaty map set on an ancient lake bed that now serves as a flood plain for seasonal desert rains. Elevated mountain regions divide the battlefield into distinct strategic zones, creating controlled movement and clear lines of engagement while maintaining fair, symmetrical layouts for all players. A pool of five possible native settlements can appear each game: the in-base settlement may be Aztec or Navajo, while the canyon settlement may be Comanche, Jesuit, or Apache. Balanced resources and trade routes support long Treaty builds, making Quad Peaks well suited for competitive team play and coordinated late-game battles.

Crescent Ridge features a sweeping crescent-shaped mountain that cleaves these Asian highlands into mirrored valleys. Dense jungle forests blanket the lowlands and ridge lines, while steep cliffs and narrow passes create natural choke points that shape movement and long-term strategy. Shaolin settlements lie protected within each player’s starting valley, offering early and reliable alliances, while Zen settlements stand beyond the ridges, drawing players into contested ground. Control of the high ground and mountain crossings will decide which team ultimately commands the region.

Lakota Hill  A windswept stretch of the Great Plains centers on a commanding hill overlooking open grasslands. Teams are evenly divided by two clear lines that define the battlefield. To the north lies a narrow choke designed for native skirmishes, while the south opens into a wide passage built for massive team fights. Rich in resources, Lakota Hill offers abundant herds, forests, and gold. This classic tournament map provides the perfect setup for players who want a no-frills, head-to-head battle. Native Settlements: Lakota, Cherokee
Resurrected Map (with permission)

Pioneer's Pass - Set in a New England / Mid-Atlantic landscape, Pioneer’s Pass is defined by a dramatic central mountain that appears deliberately split, creating a natural corridor through the heart of the map. A visible trail runs North to South, reinforcing the sense of an ancient passage carved through the terrain. Two towering mounds rise on opposite sides, shaping movement and line-of-sight. Each player begins with two nearby treasures that reward Pilgrims, offering an early strategic choice. Native settlements: Lenape, Cherokee, Seminole, Huron, or Haudenosaunee.

Devil's Pit A massive sunken pit dominates the center of this tropical battleground, carving the land into distinct lanes and forcing decisive engagements around its cavernous depths. This unspoiled island is rich in coal deposits wild animals and dense palm forests. Cave entrances and natural chokepoints shape movement during treaty play, while coastal waters and contested native settlements reward map control and careful positioning. Native settlements: Tupi or Carib and Myan, Mapuche, Zapotec

Mojave Mesas - Large mesas divide this valley located in the Mojave Desert. A small lake creates a rare desert oasis, while dense forests line the outer rim. Hunts and other natural resources are abundant. Natives: Comanche or Jesuit and Cheyenne or Navajo

Amba Highlands - Battle in the shadow of the Amba. A massive, flat-topped mountain dominates the center of the Great Rift Valley, creating a natural wall between teams. Rich herds of zebra, ostrich and giraffe graze in the lowlands. Natives Settlements: Somali, Yoruba

Summit's Edge - Summit’s Edge places players along the frozen rim of a colossal mountain. Open approaches along the rim reward positioning and timing, while the central routes invite decisive engagements. Native Settlements: Bankti or Udessi and Bourbon, Habsburg, Hanover, Jagiellon, Oldenburg, Phanar, Vasa, Wettin, Wittlsbach.

Anatolian Gedík - Battle within the high stone walls of the Anatolian Gedík Impassable mountain ranges encircle the valley floor, creating a natural fortress where teams must fight for every acre of the dry steppe. Native Settlements: Every player can choose 1 native alliance, there are no native settlements on the map.

Andes Unknown - Snow, Desert, Jungle... Natives, Alliances or both!? Cows or Sheep? Command Post Or Town Center?  All natives are possible and all native alliances are possible! Jump into the Unknown Arena!

Mosaic Nexus - No two wars are fought on the same ground. This kaleidoscopic landscape shifts between snow, desert, jungle, and more. Fortify your enclave, secure your private supply lines, and march through the mountain pass to defeat your opponent. There are two native settlements that are static to each biome

Arena Unknown v1.0

Snow, Desert, Jungle... Natives, Alliances or both!? Cows or Sheep? Command Post Or Town Center? Different layouts and biomes are possible with over 132 combinations are possible. All natives are possible and all native alliances are possible! Jump into the Arena Unknown!

Dakota - Classic Dakota map reworked for optimal treaty experience. Map size increased in 3v3 and 4v4, Natives have been moved, Cree now in base behind center cliff for each team. Comanche now on left side for both teams. Team placement also adjusted and moved further back to open the map up more, resulting in starting fights having more space behind them.

Mexico - Classic Mexico map reworked for optimal treaty experience. Spawns have been adjusted so teams are further away from each other and can easily join walls in 2v2+ games. Every player gets gold mine. Ring of trees has been added to the back of each base for long term wood sustain needed in treaty.

Rockies - Classic Rockies map reworked for optimal treaty experience. Trade routes have been removed, center native posts have been moved to right side of each teams base and are accessible in base in 3v3 and 4v4 matches.

Balanced Treaty Patch 2026

If you're wondering why Akbar and why French, it's because French was widely used as... the lingua franca of diplomacy and trade. The second reason is my own kink about an alternate universe in which India was “colonized” by France.

I put the word “colonize” in quotation marks not because I don't consider it colonization, but quite the opposite—I don't think it's possible to take over the entire rich and amazing culture of India (or rather, the Mughals).

If I had more skills and time, I would like to make my own small, alternative mod that changes the perspective from British to French.

Discord @elegy5275

This mod introduces Meiji Restoration as a Revolt option in Consulate. When you hit Age IV, you can spend 1000F, 1000W, 1000G to enter Revolt status.

  • Your deck turns into Revolt Deck
  • Ashigaru, Yumi, Samurai, Naginata, Yabusame, Shinobi, Yamabusa, Tokugawa Shogun, and Daimyos are banned.
  • Instead, Hanpei Musketeer, Konoe Cavalry, Sanpei, and Saigo Takamori are enabled.
  • Military upgrades that have been researched before (Disciplined, Honored etc.) will be transfered to these new units.
  • There are two new Consulate allies that you can form an alliance with: Americans and Brazillians.
  • You can no longer enter Japanese Isolation.
  • You can now choose to spend 1500F, 1500W, 1500G in TC to age up to Age V. (you cannot build a Wonder at this point)
  • The Revolt Deck resets to your Original Deck.

Note that some of the revolt cards have names marked in yellow (Melee Combat, Bloody Harvest etc.). These revolt cards have slightly different effects than the original cards. When you send any of these cards at any time (be it the original or the revolt version, before or after revolting), their counterparts will also be sent.

 

Some Unique Cards

  • The Sword Abolishment Edict: Ships 7 Hatamoto Samurais and increases their movement speed by +15% at the cost of 1000G
  • Westernization: Upgrades Konoe Cavalry, Hanpei Musketeer, and Sanpei to Guard status at the cost of 1000G
  • Krupp Guns: Ships two Culverins and upgrades them to "Krupp Guns", and allows you to ship them infinitely from Consulate
  • Foreign Advisors: Receives 1500 Export and a trickle of +0.50 Export at the cost of 1000G
  • Bloody Harvest: Allows Konoe Cavalry to freely switch between Lance Attack Mode and Saber Attack Mode. Lance Attack Mode has more range, and does more damage to Skirmishers and Archers. Saber Attack Mode does more damage to Artillery

USA: Consulate units cost -15%

Company: 4 Marines
Force: 10 Marines
Army: 14 Marines, 3 Gatling Guns
Brigade: 18 Marines, 4 Culverins

  • Coffee Mill Guns: Gatling Guns fire continuously
  • Spencer Repeating Rifle: Skirmishers do extra 0.50x damage to Heavy Infantry, and Gunpowder Dragoons get extra +2 Attack Range
  • Commodore: Ships Commodore that can train Meiji units, and boost nearby military 
    units

Brazil: +0.60 Export trickle rate

by Biron

Indian Overhaul Project is a large-scale expansion mod that reimagines and vastly expands the Indian civilization in Age of Empires III. Designed with historical depth, gameplay balance, and replayability in mind, this mod transforms India into one of the most diverse and strategically rich civilizations in the game.

Massively Expanded Unit Roster

Introduces dozens of new infantry, cavalry, artillery, and unique regional units inspired by the military traditions of the Indian subcontinent. Each unit fills a distinct tactical role, encouraging diverse army compositions and playstyles.

New & Reworked Buildings

Adds culturally authentic military, economic, and religious structures that enhance strategic depth while preserving the identity of the Indian civilization.

Enhanced Home City & Shipments

Expanded shipment system with new cards focused on regional powers, economic specialization, military reforms, and late-game scaling.

Deeper Gameplay Mechanics

New mechanics and rebalanced systems improve progression from early to late game, offering more meaningful choices without overwhelming complexity.

Historical & Cultural Inspiration

Units, architecture, and mechanics draw inspiration from various Indian traditions and empires, blending authenticity with balanced gameplay.

Compatible & Stable

Designed to integrate smoothly with standard AoE3 gameplay, skirmish, and multiplayer environments while maintaining performance and stability.

Indian Overhaul Project aims to make playing India feel grand, flexible, and rewarding, whether you prefer economic dominance, tactical warfare, or late-game power plays.

Credits

Thanks to InnateJaguar501 for allowing me to use some of his wonderful flora-fauna graphics from Global Bestiary Mod.

Thanks to Phoenix for teaching me how to add new models to the game.

Thanks to all members on Discord who have helped me with their ideas.

Connect

You can discuss the mod at Discord

You can DM me over on Steam

Final Words

This mod was a massive undertaking, taking countless hours to build.

I have tried my best to make it as polished as possible. But it might have few balance issues or bugs, let me know if you find any.

Please help me by sharing Indian Overhaul Project with others, so it gets more reach. 

Buy me a coffee? Every little bit helps me keep creating more: Ko-Fi

I’d love to see what you create with this mod! Please feel free to share your scenarios and screenshots with me, it makes my day to see them in action.

modName: MOD Mexican Unión, Religión e Independencia Flag Trigarante Iturbide
description:
Today is Mexico's Flag Day! This flag was used by our first Emperor, Agustín I, and as a consequence of it, it was based on the previous flag, with the idea of the Three Guaranties, but with a crown symbolizing the empire itself, with the surronding words "Unión, Religión e Independencia" (Union, Religion, Independency) in the spanish of the time.

Enjoy!

Этот мод улучшает описание кладов выделяя цветом ресурс, который они предоставляют, и сокращая их описание.

Работает только на русском языке!

 

This mod improves the description of treasures by coloring the resource that the treasure provides and shortening its description.

Works only in Russian!

translated by Biron

Habilita la pocibilidad de Revolucionar como los Sovieticos para Rusia

A de más de eso que incluye el mod ?

Lo intente que sea lo más vanila posible , pero bueno que tal el desbalance ?

  1. Guardia Rojo ) Tipo Gerrillero con exelentes estadisticas ademas de recivir mejora cara que lo vuelve aun mejor y consigue bonos contra Mercenarios y Heroes sigue siendo devil a los cañones y Caballeria Pesada por buen motivo (Historia Corta Guardia roja asi se le llamava al cuerpo en cargado del orden (Tipo Policia))
  2. El Espia ) Recive una mejora Especial "Chequista" Lo que lo buelve viable por fin . (Historia Corta asi es como se le llamava a los espias en la URSS )
  3. Camarada ) Tipo milicia , aldena Bueno en cultivos y leñando Permite recuperar economia o crearlos en masa Para la defensa (Historia Corta A si es como se llaman los civiles de esta Idiologia)

Respecto a la Revolución

Este mod esta inspirado en las viejas revoluciones donde eparecia el rostro de la figura fundadora de la revolución aunque tambien inclui dos archivos de arte por si quieres la versión censurada lo dejo a tu gusto 

Contexto :

La revolución soviética decidi que tu el jugador Realmente Tubieras que tomar desiciones ya que la revolución no parece dejar expuesto economicamente La verdad es que si te deja ya desde el mazo

te das cuenta que solo sirve para Granjear y los Aldeanos nuevos numerosos y rapidos pero no trabajan bien en las fincas asi que la estrategia se basa en defenderte asta ser más fuerte quel rival 

Retorno a Rusia :

¿ Por que Mijaíl Gorbachov ? 
Por que Retornar Es un todo o nada Real (Historia Corta ; La caida de la URSS tuvo una consecuensia muy devastadora en la sociedad Tanto que los de la K.G.B. (Los Guardias y Espias) se Sublevaron )

description:
對作者Ropi336的東歐文明模組進行中文翻譯

作者Ropi336的東歐文明：https://www.ageofempires.com/mods/details/18891/

 

隔了幾個月時間，再次進行上傳自己的翻譯模組。這是我第一次翻譯的複數文明，而且這個模組還要特地把xml檔轉xmb檔，多一個小工程。不過這個我早就在去年已經翻譯完了，只是沒時間放上來，還有一些文明也翻譯完了，會趁目前還算得空的時候放上來。

這個模組總共有3個文明，去年翻譯的同時也進行試玩。不過隔太久時間了，差不多忘記該怎麼玩了，大致只記得就只有匈牙利和羅馬尼亞兩個文明能玩。另一個聯邦文明似乎有點問題，不過我忘記是什麼原因了。



有什麼資料可以補充的，歡迎補充。

一个食物木材黄金资源公平且量大的的地图，但是在宝藏上就要靠运气了.双方玩家各在一个只有一个狭窄出口的便于防守的高地上展开对决.  

    A map with fair and abundant food, wood, and gold, but treasures depend on luck.Each player starts on a defensible plateau with only one narrow exit, ready for battle."

    2026.3.3

對作者AIRBORNE的德州文明模組進行中文翻譯


作者AIRBORNE的德州文明：https://www.ageofempires.com/mods/details/223074/


也是一個單文明的模組，不過我試玩過後也是沒打算再玩了。裡面有一個建築叫志願營，類似日本的道場一樣會生產免費兵出來，不過我不大會玩這種類型的建築，常常突然出現佔人口，不然就是會不小心忘記有這種建築存在。對我來說有點難玩。


有什麼資料可以補充的，歡迎補充。
A mod which adds an additional tech. Go to the scenario editor and try it.

一个资源公平且量大的的地图，双方玩家各在一个只有一个狭窄出口的便于防守的高地上展开对决.AI则有各种作弊，资源采集加成卡，资源细流，造兵加速，国会科技.

     A map with fair and abundant resources.Each player starts on a defensible plateau with only one narrow exit.The AI has various cheats: resource gathering boosts, infinite resource streams, faster unit production, and congressional technologies.  

2026.3.5

modName: Legacy Maps Age Of Empires III by Ensemble Studios
description:
Feeling nostalgic? Return to where it all began with the original maps from the base game of Age of Empires III by Ensemble Studios!

This mod contains every map that was present in the initial release of the game, before any expansions were added. Once installed, you will find these maps listed in your custom map list prefixed with "Legacy" (e.g., Legacy Carolina).

Features:

The Core Experience: All maps are presented exactly as they were in the 2005 base game—pure, unedited, and authentic.

Vanilla Collection: Includes the classic maps that defined the original Age of Empires III experience.

Enjoy this trip down memory lane!

modName: Legacy Maps Age Of Empires III War Chiefs by Ensemble Studios
description:
Feeling nostalgic? Head back to the frontier with the original maps from Age of Empires III: The WarChiefs by Ensemble Studios!

This mod brings back the full suite of maps as they appeared in the first expansion, capturing the specific feel of the North and South American wilderness. Once installed, you will find these maps in your custom map list prefixed with "War Chiefs" (e.g., War Chiefs Orinoco). 

Features:

Authentic Experience: Every map is presented exactly as it was in the legacy expansion—no modern edits or layout changes.

The Frontier Collection: Includes all maps introduced in The WarChiefs, as well as the base game maps available at that time.

Relive the glory days and enjoy this trip down memory lane!

modName: Legacy Maps Age Of Empires III The Asian Dynasties by Ensemble Studios
description:
Feeling nostalgic? Revisit the battlefields that started it all with the original maps from Age of Empires III: The Asian Dynasties.

This mod restores every single map present in the final Ensemble Studios release. To keep your menu organized, each map is listed in your custom map list prefixed with "TAD" (e.g., TAD Yukon).

Features:

Authentic Experience: All maps are presented exactly as they were in the legacy game—no balance edits, no redesigns.

Complete Collection: Includes every map from the base game through The Asian Dynasties expansion.

Enjoy this trip down memory lane!

A mod which adds a bunch of unit shipments to the tech tree. Go to the scenario editor and try it.

"这是一个正面便于防守，侧面可以突袭的地图，中间有大量的资源鼓励玩家去冒险.AI后期被大幅度强化，快速造建筑，快速出兵，采集速度加强，不用采集资源也会有资源收入，不用造房子也有人口空间.This is a map where the front is easy to defend and the flanks allow for surprise attacks. There are abundant resources in the center to encourage players to take risks.The AI is greatly strengthened in the late game: faster building construction, faster unit training, increased resource gathering speed, resource income without gathering resources, and population space without building houses."

2026.3.15 APNHQ

modName: Age of the World - Deutsch Patch
description:
Diese Mod ist ein Patch für die Mod Age of the World welcher die Mod ins deutsche übersetzt.

Falls Ihr Probleme bei der Übersetzung findet schreibt mich bitte auf dem offiziellen Age of the World Discord Server an.

Die Originale Mod ist zwingend erforderlich, diese findet Ihr hier: https://www.ageofempires.com/mods/details/126056/

Falls Ihr auch mit den zwei Kampagnen Zivilisationen spielen wollt braucht Ihr zusätzlich die hier: https://www.ageofempires.com/mods/details/184215/

Die Reihenfolge der Mods muss wie folgt sein damit es funktioniert:

  1. Age of the World - Deutsch Patch
  2. Age of the World - Campaign Civs
  3. Age of the World

Mod Version 1.0 2026 March version.

Adds combat veterancies for buildings based on unit kills. (9 levels that start at 2 kills to a max of 28 kills. Each level gives 20% incease in hitpoints and attack. And a slight incease in rate of fire.

Mod Version 1.0 2026 March version.

Adds combat veterancies for Naval units based on that unit's kills. From Officer Cadet to Vice Admiral (9 levels that start at 1 kills to a max of 25 kills). Each level gives 10% incease in hitpoints and att

modName: Saxon Cuirassier Gold Cost for Prince-Electors
description: This mod changes the wood cost of Saxon Cuirassiers from wood to gold if you ally them with the Prince-Elector card.

modName: Advanced Arsenal Card Sends Arsenal Wagon
description: Makes the Advanced Arsenal Card send an Arsenal Wagon, as it should be.

**IMPORTANT: To use in multiplayer, do NOT load this as a mod!!! Instead, copy the mod's file directly into your AOE3DE game directory (Steam/Steamapps/Common/AoE3DE). Maintain the same folder structure starting from AoE3DE/art/(two mod files), then disable the mod in the mod manager!!! 

 

Adds a coloured ring onto the aquatic wildlife for better visibility and indicate their resource type at a quick glance. VISIBILITY IMPROVES AT LOWER WATER GRAPHIC SETTINGS AND DEPENDS ON MAP LIGHTING!!!

(There probably a better way to do this, but this is just my solution. Suggestion are welcome.)

modName: [Tool] Memory Cleaner Map - Fix Lag  Purge VRAM Cache  メモリ解放動作軽量化ツール
description:
日本語の説明は真下

Hello everyone! Have you ever experienced the game feeling sluggish, UI lagging, or stuttering after playing several matches in a row?

AoE3DE is a beautiful game, but the Bang Engine sometimes struggles with garbage collection during long sessions. In my testing, even when brute-forcing the game with a high-end rig (Ryzen 9 9950X, 128GB of DDR5 RAM, and an RTX 5090 with 32GB of VRAM), the engine still hoards old textures and 3D models in the cache, eventually leading to performance drops.

Back in the old TAD days, we used to load an empty map to force the game to flush the memory. I have recreated and optimized this method for the DE version!

🌟 What does this Mod do? This is a microscopic, ultra-lightweight custom map. By loading this map, it forces the game to overwrite and purge all the heavy assets (like Japan/Deccan terrains, huge unit arrays, trees, etc.) from your VRAM and system memory. To make it seamless, I added a trigger: The map will automatically end 2 seconds after loading. You don't have to do anything!

🧹 How to use:

Subscribe to the mod and enable it in the in-game Mod Manager.
When your game starts feeling heavy, go to Single Player > Skirmish.
Select [Tool] Memory Cleaner from your Custom Maps and click Start.
The map will load into a blank plains screen. Wait for 2 seconds.
The "You Victorious!" screen will pop up automatically.
Exit to the main menu. Your memory cache is now completely flushed and fresh!
💡 Highly Recommended: Combine with the CPU Core Fix If you are running a modern CPU with high core/thread counts (like 8 cores / 16 threads or more), the game engine might also suffer from micro-stutters due to thread scheduling.

For the ultimate smooth experience, I highly recommend using this Memory Cleaner map in combination with the CPU Affinity Fix detailed in this thread: 👉 Fix for micro stutters, dropped frames, and constant freezes in Age of Empires 3 on modern CPUs

I hope this helps players who suffer from memory leaks and performance drops during long play sessions. Let me know if you have any feedback!

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

何試合も連続でプレイしていると、UIの反応が鈍くなったり、ゲーム全体が重くカクついたりしたことはありませんか？

AoE3DEは素晴らしいゲームですが、長時間プレイするとゲームエンジン側で古いデータの解放（ガベージコレクション）がうまくいかないことがあります。テスト環境としてRyzen 9 9950X、128GBのDDR5メモリ、VRAM 32GBのRTX 5090という構成で動かしていても、エンジン内部の仕様上、古いテクスチャやキャッシュが蓄積して最終的にパフォーマンスが低下してしまいます。

旧TAD時代には「空のマップを読み込ませてメモリを解放する」という手法がありましたが、それをDE版の仕様に合わせて最適化し、復活させました！

🌟 このModの仕組み これは極小サイズで超軽量なカスタムマップです。このマップを読み込むことで、VRAMやシステムメモリに溜まった重いアセット（複雑な地形、大量のユニットデータ、森など）を強制的に上書きし、パージ（破棄）させます。 より簡単に使えるようにトリガーを仕込みました。ロード完了から2秒後に自動的にゲームが終了するようになっています。

🧹 使い方:

Modをサブスクライブし、ゲーム内のModマネージャーで有効にします。
ゲームが重くなってきたら、シングルプレーヤー ＞ スカーミッシュ を開きます。
カスタムマップから [Tool] Memory Cleaner を選んで開始します。
何もない平野がロードされます。何も操作せずに2秒待ってください。
自動的に「勝利」画面が表示され、ゲームが終了します。
メインメニューに戻ると、メモリキャッシュが完全にリフレッシュされた状態になります！


💡 さらに快適にするための併用おすすめ設定 最近のメニーコア環境（8コア/16スレッド以上）を使用している場合、ゲームエンジンの仕様により特有のカクつき（マイクロスタッター）が発生することがあります。このメモリ解放マップに加えて、公式フォーラムで有志が公開している「CPUアフィニティ（使用コア）の制限」を併用すると、劇的に動作が安定するので非常におすすめです！

 👉 多コアCPU向け カクつき・フレームドロップ修正スレッド (英語フォーラム)

長時間プレイ時の重さやメモリリークに悩んでいる方の助けになれば嬉しいです。フィードバックがあればぜひ教えてください！

The Age of Forts transforms every civilization into a true fortress-builder. Stronger structures, longer battles, smarter AI behavior, and more consistent gameplay. Forts & outposts strike harder.  A battle worthy of kings, and perfect for players who enjoy big wars, fortified lines, and strategic depth. Battles will consist of siege attacks, making siege weapons one of the top priorities and giving them greater importance in the game. AI will rebuild, defend, and push with greater purpose.
